display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name give dnote; official homepage brand is Dnote.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Dnote website and best supplied documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/dnote/dnote; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a command-line notebook; source_facts.executables lists dnote.
